Enjoy exclusive Taj Epicure & EazyDiner Prime membership. Get unlimited airport lounge access and complimentary golf rounds, along with a host of premium lifestyle privileges. Experience the magic of movies and events with exclusive BookMyShow offers – Enjoy unmatched entertainment like never before! Unlimited lounge access Unlimited Domestic airport lounge access for both Primary and Plus Card members. Click here  to update your Nominee details. Click here for T&Cs Refund of ₹12,000 No cancellation charges on domestic flight and hotel bookings, up to ₹12,000.  Click here Fuel surcharge waiver Get 1% waiver on fuel transactions at all fuel stations Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹200 spend 6 On Retail Spend* Grocery, Utilities, and Education: Max 1,000 Reward Points per category per statement cycle Insurance payments: Max 5,000 Reward Points per category per statement cycle Redeem reward points for: Health and Beauty Travel and Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion and Lifestyle Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card: Fees & Charges Joining fee and Annual fee Joining fee: ₹12,499 + GST Annual fee: ₹12,499 + GST (Spend over ₹10 lakh and get your annual fee waived for the next year) Forex Markup 2% ATM withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month Finance Charges Pay 3.75% interest per month Late Payment Charges Nil Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges Click here  for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents By invitation only, please get in touch with your Relationship Manager Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card FAQs Is the Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card a luxury Credit Card? Yes. The Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card is a luxury Credit Card from ICICI Bank. It is packed with plenty of premium benefits. What is the best metal Credit Card currently available with ICICI bank? If you are looking for the best metal Credit Card, then the ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card is an excellent choice for you. It has top luxury lifestyle offers & benefits. Is there a joining fee and Annual fee for the ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card? Yes. The Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card has a joining fee and Annual fee of ₹12,499 + GST. How can Emeralde Private Metal Credit Cardholders claim their joining vouchers? Step 1: Log into ICICI Bank Rewards •  iMobile App: Open iMobile 🡪 Cards & Forex 🡪 Select Credit Card 🡪 Redeem 🡪 Joining Benefit •  Internet Banking: Log in 🡪 Cards 🡪 Credit cards 🡪 Select Credit Card 🡪 Redeem 🡪 Joining Benefit Step 2: On the Rewards site, click the ‘Joining Benefit / Annual Benefit’ tab to open the Benefits Page. Step 3: Find details for your TAJ Epicure and EazyDiner vouchers. Your Voucher Code and / or PIN and steps to redeem are displayed next to each voucher Follow the on-screen instructions for membership activation and voucher redemption. For details and T&Cs, click here When will I get the Joining Benefits for my Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card? You will receive an e-mail regarding the same within 45 business days after the payment of the Joining Fee. How to avail complimentary international airport lounge access? Enjoy unlimited complimentary access to international airport lounges with ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for both the primary cardholder and Plus cardholder with ICICI Bank Emeralde Metal Credit Card Access 1,800+ lounges in 146 countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? For lounge visits within India, Primary and Add-on Cardholders can avail unlimited complimentary lounge access through ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card. Please swipe the ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card to avail the complimentary lounge access. To view the complete list of lounges, click here . What are the golf privileges and eligibility criteria? As an Emeralde Private Metal, Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for unlimited round or lesson of golf. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit https://teetimes.truztee.com/   and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered against your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months. To view the updated list of golf courses, please click here . For complete details on the Golf programme and the associated terms and conditions, please click here . You may also call iAssist, the 24x7 concierge service on 1800-26-70731 (toll free for MTNL or BSNL lines) or 022-67872016 (standard call charges applicable) for assistance with online booking. How do I make the booking for Golf Rounds? Eligible ICICI Bank Credit Card members can book their Golf Rounds by following the below steps: Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes.truztee.com/ with your registered mobile number. Choose your preferred golf course and select your preferred date and tee time. Submit your booking request and await confirmation. Check your Booking History to view all bookings and details. You may also call i-Assist, our 24X7 concierge service on 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL lines) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable), for assistance with online booking. An authorisation amount of ₹2 shall be taken for each eligible Card. What are the movie ticket benefits available Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card? Cardholders are eligible for a Buy-One-Get-One movies, sport events, theatre or concert tickets offer worth up to ₹750 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . What are the key features of the concierge services offered? The concierge services provide 24/7 support for varied needs such as restaurant reservations, flower and gift deliveries, hotel and flight bookings, car rentals and even movie ticket delivery. Additionally, the service offers emergency auto assistance and medical concierge support, ensuring comprehensive assistance during emergencies. Contact i-Assist for access to these services. To contact the i-Assist team, please call 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable). What Air Accident Insurance coverage is provided to Cardholders? The primary Cardholder is entitled to Air Accident Insurance coverage of ₹3 crore. This benefit applies only when the Card has been used at least once in the 60 days prior to the event. Note that the insurance covers international travel only, provided that the tickets were purchased using the Credit Card. Supplementary Cardholders are not eligible for this insurance coverage. For more details on the terms and conditions of the insurance cover on ICICI Bank Credit Cards. What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of up to ₹4,000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please click here . What is the age limit for the Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card? You must be between the age group of 21–65 years to be eligible to apply for the ICICI Bank Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card. How can I know the bill due date of my ICICI Bank Credit Card? You can find the bill due date of your Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card on your monthly statement, in the iMobile app, through Internet Banking or by contacting Customer Care at 1800 1080. Is it safe to transact with the Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card? Yes. Since your Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip for high-level security, you can transact safely & securely. What are the key features of the Mastercard Privileges? Mastercard Moments is an exclusive programme specially created for Mastercard cardholders. At the heart of this programme is a host of exceptional experiences designed to inspire and enrich the lives of our Mastercard cardholders, with programme members able to enjoy additional benefits. For more details,  https://specials.priceless.com/en-in/homePage How do I find the CVV on my Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card? Flip your Emeralde Private Metal Credit Card. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your Card Verification Value (CVV). You can also check it by logging in to your ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking. Enjoy exclusive Taj Epicure & EazyDiner Prime membership How can Cardholders claim their joining vouchers? To claim the joining vouchers, cardholders can follow the steps outlined in the card’s terms and conditions. For details and T&Cs, click here . View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Worth ₹10,000 Indulge in high-end fashion with a Tata CLiQ Luxury Gift Card on spends of ₹10 lakh Worth ₹10,000 WeWork day passes (India) or airport transfers from Thumby Aviation, Avis or Indian Travel House on spends of ₹5 lakh Worth ₹10,000 Discover Klook's unique international experiences and activities on spends of ₹2 lakh Premium Protection Get an Air Accident Insurance cover. Click here for T&Cs Refund of ₹12,000 No cancellation charges on domestic flight and hotel bookings, up to ₹12,000.  Click here Fuel surcharge waiver Get 1% waiver on fuel transactions at all fuel stations 24x7 concierge services Get round-the-clock concierge assistance by calling the toll-free number 18002670731 Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every spend 2.5% On International Spend 2% On Domestic Spend Redeem reward points for: Health and Beauty Travel and Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion and Lifestyle Apply now Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card: Fees and Charges Joining fee and Annual fee Joining fee- ₹20,000 + GST Annual fee- ₹20,000 + GST (Spend over ₹25 lakh and get your annual fee waived off for the next year) Forex Markup 1.49% ATM withdrawal Nil If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)   for other charges Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) Apply now Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹2,00,000 Self-employed individual with an annual income of ₹24,00,000 proof of identity proof of address Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend benefits to your loved ones Times Black Credit Card  FAQs What is Times Black ICICI Bank credit card? The Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card is an exclusive Credit Card issued by ICICI Bank in association with Times Internet Ltd. and Visa. Designed for Ultra-High Net Worth Individuals (UHNIs), this card offers premium benefits across various categories, including luxury stays, travel experiences, lifestyle and mobility. How long are Milestone Benefits available to eligible cardholders? Milestone Benefits can be accessed through the Times Black app for a period of six months, starting from the date the eligible cardholder is notified about the respective milestone by ICICI Bank. How to avail Complimentary International Airport lounge access? Enjoy unlimited complimentary accesses to international airport lounges with Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for both the primary cardholder and Plus cardholder with Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? For lounge visits within India, Primary and Add-on Cardholders can avail unlimited complimentary lounge access through Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card. Please swipe the Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card to avail the complimentary lounge access. To view the complete list of lounges, click here . How are ICICI Bank reward points earned? Are there any limits or exclusions? You can earn 2% ICICI Bank reward points on all eligible domestic transactions. However, there is a cap of 5,000 reward points per statement cycle for the following categories: Utility payments Insurance premium payments Education payments Government payments (such as property tax, advance tax, fees, court payments, postal payments, etc.) Additionally, ICICI Bank reward points will not be earned on fuel transactions, rent payments or transactions converted into EMIs. The points earned on such transactions will be reversed. What is the value of 1 ICICI Bank reward point, and how can it be redeemed? The value of 1 ICICI Bank reward point can be up to ₹ 1. However, when redeeming ICICI Bank reward points against your statement, the redemption rate is 1 Reward Point (RP) = ₹0.40. Does the Times Black Credit Card offer any luxury Gift Card benefits? Yes, as a Times Black Credit Card holder, you receive a TATA CLiQ Luxury Gift Card worth ₹10,000, which can be used to shop for premium luxury items and experiences. What are the Times Black Credit Card benefits related to international experiences? With the Times Black Credit Card, you can enjoy international experiences and benefits worth ₹10,000 on Klook, allowing you to explore exciting activities and attractions worldwide. What luxury stay benefits does the Times Black Credit Card provide? The Times Black Credit Card offers a one-night luxury stay at Ayatana or Lohono worth ₹20,000, providing an unforgettable getaway experience in a luxurious setting. What are the charges applicable for the Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card? Joining Fee: ₹ 20,000 + GST Annual Fee: ₹ 20,000 + GST How can I get the annual fee waiver? You can get your annual fee waived from the 2nd year onwards on minimum spends of ₹25,00,000 made in the previous year. When will I get my joining benefits for the Times Black ICICI Bank Credit Card? You will receive an e-mail regarding the same within 45 business days after the payment of the joining fee. How do I complete my video KYC verification? You are required to provide your PAN Card and Aadhaar Card details followed by a video-based verification with an ICICI Bank employee. You will be required to accept a call request from the ICICI Bank employee and complete your video KYC by answering a few questions asked by them and showing the original PAN Card. Video KYC is available 24x7 on all days. How will I get the PIN for my Credit Card? You can generate the PIN in any of the following ways: Using the iMobile app: Go to Services > Card PIN Services > Generate Credit Card PIN Using Net Banking: Log into Net Banking > Generate Card PIN > Credit Card PIN > Select Card and enter CVV > Submit > Enter OTP > Enter PIN > Generate Now Using the Interactive Voice Response (IVR) system: Call Customer Care on 1800 1080 and follow the instructions. Along with unlimited access to international and domestic lounges and reward benefits, you can also get access to golf rounds or lessons every month. Travel with just one Card internationally. Click here for T&Cs Earn and use points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 4 On Domestic Spend 4 On International Spend 1 On Utility and Insurance Spend Redeem reward points for: Health and Beauty Travel and Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion and Lifestyle Apply now Emeralde Credit Card: Fees & Charges Joining Fee and Annual Fee Joining Fee- ₹12,000 + GST Annual Fee- ₹12,000 + GST (Spend over ₹10 lakh and get your Annual Fee waived for the next year) Forex Markup 2% ATM Withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month Finance Charges Pay 3.75% interest per month Late Payment Charges Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1,300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges. Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) Apply now Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹1,50,000 Self-employed with an annual income of ₹18,00,000 Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card  FAQs What are the benefits offered with the Emeralde Credit Card? The Emeralde Credit Card gives you benefits such as the following, and many more. Buy one ticket and get up to ₹750 off on the second ticket, up to 4 times in a month through BookMyShow Unlimited international and domestic airport lounge access Up to 4 golf rounds every month, basis spends on the Card How to redeem Credit Card points for rewards? You can experience seamless redemption of reward points with ICICI Bank. First, log into ICICI Bank Net Banking > Cards > Credit Cards > Redeem or the ICICI Bank's iMobile app iMobile > cards & forex > Select Credit Cards > Redeem, you can redeem your ICICI Bank reward points across multiple categories such as electronics, lifestyle, luxury, shopping and travel. How to avail Complimentary International Airport lounge access? Enjoy unlimited complimentary access to international airport lounges with ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary Cardholder. For an ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card customer who has applied for the card on or after 15 November 2024. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary Cardholder with ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? For lounge visits within India, the primary Cardholder can avail unlimited complimentary lounge access using their ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card. Please swipe the ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card to avail the complimentary lounge access. To view the complete list of lounges, click here . What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Emeralde Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer - eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. What are the golf privileges and the eligibility criteria to avail them? As an Emeralde Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for a round or lesson of golf for every ₹ 50,000 spent on retail purchases in the previous calendar month. You can avail a maximum of 4 rounds per month. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit  https://teetimes.truztee.com/  and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered for your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months. To view the updated list of golf courses, please  click here . For complete details of the golf programme and the associated terms and conditions, please   click here . You may also call iAssist, the 24/7 concierge service on 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL or BSNL lines) or 022 67872016 (standard call charges applicable) for assistance with online booking. How do I make the booking for Golf Rounds? Eligible ICICI Bank Credit Card members can book their Golf Rounds by following the below steps: Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes.truztee.com/ with your registered mobile number. Choose your preferred golf course and select your preferred date and tee time. Submit your booking request and await confirmation. Check your Booking History to view all bookings and details. You may also call i-Assist, our 24X7 concierge service on 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL lines) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable), for assistance with online booking. An authorisation amount of ₹2 shall be taken for each eligible Card. Who should use this Card? The Emeralde Credit Card is an ideal Card for people who enjoy a luxurious lifestyle. You get unlimited international and domestic lounge access for the primary Cardholder, a shopping voucher from TATA CLiQ worth ₹5,000 (only American Express Cardholders) and ICICI Bank reward points. Can I make an online purchase with the Emeralde Credit Card? Yes, you can easily make online purchases across India and in select overseas online stores using the Emeralde Credit Card. What is the age limit to apply for the Emeralde Credit Card? You must be between 21–65 years of age to be eligible to apply for the ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card. What Air Accident insurance coverage is provided to Cardholders? The primary Cardholder is entitled to Air Accident insurance coverage of ₹ 3 crore. This benefit applies only when the Card has been used at least once in the 60 days prior to the incident. Note that the insurance covers international travel only, provided that the tickets were purchased using the Credit Card. Supplemental Cardholders are not eligible for this insurance coverage. For more details on the terms and conditions of the insurance cover on ICICI Bank Credit Cards, please  click here . What are the key features of the concierge services offered? The concierge service provides 24/7 support for varied needs such as restaurant reservations, flower and gift deliveries, hotel and flight bookings, car rentals and even movie ticket delivery. Additionally, the service offers emergency auto assistance and medical concierge support, ensuring comprehensive assistance during emergencies. Contact i-Assist for access to these services. To contact the i-Assist team, please call 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL) or 022 67872016 (standard call charges applicable). What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of up to ₹ 4,000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplemental) Cardholder, helping them to save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Sapphiro Credit Card FAQs
When will I get the joining benefits for the Sapphiro Credit Card?
You will receive an e-mail regarding the same within 45 business days after the payment of the joining fee.
What is included in the joining benefit vouchers?
Upon payment of the joining fee, Cardholders will receive welcome vouchers worth over ₹13,000 within 45 days. There are vouchers worth ₹3,000 from Tata CliQ, ₹4,000 from EaseMyTrip (4 vouchers of ₹1,000 each), ₹5,000 from Da Milano, ₹1,500 from Croma (3 vouchers of ₹500 each) and an EazyDiner Prime Membership (3 months’ subscription) worth ₹1,095.
To know more about redemption of vouchers, click here
For other terms and conditions,  click here .
How can I claim my joining benefit vouchers?
Step 1: Log in to ICICI Bank Rewards
•  iMobile App:
Open iMobile 🡪 Cards & Forex 🡪 Select Credit Card 🡪 Redeem 🡪 Joining Benefit
•  Net Banking:
Log in 🡪 Cards 🡪 Credit cards 🡪 Select Credit Card 🡪 Redeem 🡪 Joining Benefit
Step 2: On the ICICI Bank Rewards site, click on the ‘Sapphiro Welcome Benefit’ tab to open the benefits page
Step 3: Select your vouchers
Tap on ‘Add’ against any voucher
Choose the quantity
Tap on ‘Claim Now’
Verify with OTP (choose SMS or e-mail)
Give consent and tap on ‘Generate OTP’
Enter the OTP received and tap on ‘Submit’. The full voucher code and PIN will be shared on your registered e-mail ID
You can view your claimed vouchers at: Order History → Tap voucher → Show Code (OTP required again) → View your voucher code & PIN
For details and T&Cs click here
Can I make an online purchase with the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card?
Yes. You can easily make online purchases across India and in select overseas stores using the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card.
Is an ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card free?
No, the Card has a joining fee of ₹6,500 and an annual fee of ₹3,500.
What is included in the joining benefit vouchers?
Upon payment of the joining fee, Cardholders will receive welcome vouchers worth over ₹13,000 within 45 days. There are vouchers worth ₹3,000 from Tata CliQ, ₹4,000 from EaseMyTrip (4 vouchers of ₹1,000 each),₹1,095 EazyDiner Prime Membership(3 months subscription), ₹5,000 Da Milano and ₹1,500 from Croma(3 vouchers of ₹500 each). Detailed redemption steps and terms can be accessed through the official Credit Card website.
To know more about redemption of vouchers, click here
For other terms and conditions,  click here .
How can Cardholders claim their joining vouchers?
To claim the joining vouchers, cardholders can follow the steps outlined in the card’s terms and conditions.
Click here  to know more about the steps to claim vouchers.
How to avail Complimentary International Airport lounge access?
Enjoy 2 complimentary international airport lounge access visits with ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder.
The following applies to an ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card customer who has applied for the card on or after 15 November 2024.
Priority Pass Membership
Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary cardholder with ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card
Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide
Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges.
For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges
For an ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card customer who has applied for the card before 15 November 2024.
DreamFolks Membership
Access 650+ lounges in 100+ countries
Present your DreamFolks Membership Card at the participating international lounges
Click here for the complete list of international airport lounges
How can I avoid the annual fee of the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card?
If you spend over ₹6 lakh, you can get your annual fee waived off for the next year.
What is CVV in a Credit Card? How do I find the CVV in my Sapphiro Credit Card?
Flip your Sapphiro Credit Card. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV. You can also check it by logging in to your ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking.
Which bank’s Credit Card should I opt for?
The ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card is an excellent choice. It offers premium perks like Reward Points, complimentary airport lounge access, buy one get one offer on BookMyShow and welcome offers from Uber, EaseMyTrip, Croma, Tata CLiQ and more.
What is the age limit to apply for Sapphiro Credit Card?
You must be between the ages of 21 and 65 years to be eligible to apply for the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card.
How do I know the Due Date of an ICICI Bank Credit Card?
You can find your ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card’s Due Date on your monthly statement, on the ICICI Bank's iMobile app, through Net Banking or by calling our Customer Care on
1800 1080.
What is the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card best used for?
The ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card is best used for travel and lifestyle expenses. It has a wide range of offers like complimentary Airport Lounge access, BookMyShow offers, Welcome Vouchers and much more!
What are the criteria for availing domestic airport lounge access?
To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Sapphiro Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder.
For customers with dual Credit Card variants (MasterCard and Amex), the entitlement includes 2 domestic lounge visits per quarter for each variant.
Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here .
What are the golf privileges and eligibility criteria?
As a Sapphiro Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for a round or lesson of golf for every ₹50,000 spent on retail purchases in the previous calendar month. You can avail of a maximum of 4 rounds per month. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit https://teetimes.truztee.com/ and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered against your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months.
To view the updated list of golf courses, please  click here . For complete details on the Golf programme and the associated terms and conditions, please  click here . You may also call iAssist, the 24/7 concierge service on 1800-26-70731 (toll free for MTNL or BSNL lines) or 022-67872016 (standard call charges applicable) for assistance with online booking.
How do I make the booking for Golf Rounds?
Eligible ICICI Bank Credit Card members can book their Golf Rounds by following the below steps:
Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes.truztee.com/ with your registered mobile number.
Choose your preferred golf course and select your preferred date and tee time.
Submit your booking request and await confirmation.
Check your Booking History to view all bookings and details.
You may also call i-Assist, our 24X7 concierge service on 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL lines) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable), for assistance with online booking. An authorisation amount of ₹2 shall be taken for each eligible Card.
What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow?
Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Sapphiro Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period.
Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period:
Spends period offer - eligibility period
Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026.
Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026.
Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here .
Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter
Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow?
Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025.
Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below-
Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section
Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking
Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards
Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’
Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page.
What are the key features of the concierge services offered?
The concierge services provide 24/7 support for varied needs such as restaurant reservations, flower and gift deliveries, hotel and flight bookings, car rentals and even movie ticket delivery. Additionally, the service offers emergency auto assistance and medical concierge support, ensuring comprehensive assistance during emergencies. Contact i-Assist for access to these services. To contact the i-Assist team, please call 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable).
What Air Accident Insurance coverage is provided to Cardholders?
The primary Cardholder is entitled to Air Accident Insurance coverage of ₹3 crore. This benefit applies only when the Card has been used at least once in the 60 days prior to the event. Note that the insurance covers international travel only, provided that the tickets were purchased using the Credit Card. Supplementary Cardholders are not eligible for this insurance coverage. For more details on the terms and conditions of the insurance cover on ICICI Bank Credit Cards, please  click here .
What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders?
Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent.
What security features are provided by the chip and PIN?
The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here .
What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders?
Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of up to ₹4,000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card.
What are the differences between the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card’s Amex and Mastercard variants?
The core benefits remain the same. Differences are mainly in card network acceptance, lounge access allocation per variant, and select merchant offers based on Amex or Mastercard.
Is the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card suitable for frequent travellers in 2026?
Yes, the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card offers travel-related features such as lounge access and reward points , subject to eligibility and applicable terms.
Why is my new ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card not working for lounge access yet?
For domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card in a calendar quarter to become eligible. The card also offers 2 complimentary international airport lounge accesses, subject to applicable terms and conditions.
What is the minimum credit limit for the ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card?
The credit limit is assigned based on income, credit profile, and internal assessment criteria defined by ICICI Bank.
Why is my new ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card not working for lounge access yet?
For domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card in a calendar quarter to become eligible. The card also offers 2 complimentary international airport lounge accesses, subject to applicable terms and conditions.
What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow?
Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Emirates Sapphiro Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period.
Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period:
Spends period offer - eligibility period
Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026.
Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026.
Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here .
Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter
Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow?
Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025.
Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below-
Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section
Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking
Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards
Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’
Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page.

Rubyx Credit Card FAQs
Is the ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card free?
No, the card has a joining fee of ₹3,000 and an annual fee of ₹2,000.
When will I get my Joining Benefits for the Rubyx Credit Card?
You will receive an e-mail regarding the same within 45 business days after the payment of the Joining Fee.
What is included in the joining benefit vouchers?
Upon payment of the joining fee, Credit Cardholders will receive welcome vouchers worth over ₹15,000 on their registered e-mail ID within 45 days. There are vouchers worth ₹2,000 from Tata CLiQ, ₹2,000 from EaseMyTrip (2 vouchers of ₹1,000 each for domestic flight bookings), ₹1,000 from Croma (2 vouchers of ₹500 each), ₹3,000 from EaseMyTrip for holiday packages and ₹10,000 from Elivaas. You also get a 3-month EazyDiner Prime Membership worth ₹1,095 and up to 35% discount at Avis for car rentals.To know more about redemption of vouchers, click here
For other Terms and Conditions,  click here
How can Cardholders claim their joining vouchers?
Step 1: Log in to ICICI Bank Rewards
•  iMobile App:
Open iMobile 🡪 Cards & Forex 🡪 Select Credit Card 🡪 Redeem 🡪 Joining Benefit
•  Net Banking:
Log in 🡪 Cards 🡪 Credit cards 🡪 Select Credit Card 🡪 Redeem 🡪 Joining Benefit
Step 2: On the Rewards site, click the Rubyx Welcome Benefit tab to open the Benefits Page.
Step 3: Select Your Vouchers
• Tap ADD on any voucher
• Choose the quantity
• Tap CLAIM NOW
• Verify with OTP (Choose SMS or E-Mail)
• Tick consent and tap Generate OTP
• Enter the OTP received and tap SUBMIT and full voucher code and PIN will be shared on your register mail ID.
• View claimed vouchers in Order History → Tap voucher → Show Code (OTP required again) → View your voucher code & PIN
For details and T&Cs, click here .
How can I get the annual fee waived off for the ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card?
If you spend over ₹3 lakh, you can get your annual fee waived off for the next year.
Can I make an online purchase with the ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card?
Yes. You can easily make online purchases across India and in select overseas stores using the ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card.
What is CVV in a Credit Card? How do I find it in my ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card?
Flip your Rubyx Credit Card. The three-digit Security Code next to the signature panel is your CVV (Card Verification Value). You can also check it by logging in to your ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking.
Which Credit Card should I opt for to get benefits on shopping?
ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card is one of the best choices. It offers several benefits for shopping enthusiasts.
What is the age limit to apply for a Rubyx Credit Card?
You must be between the age of 21 and 65 years to be eligible to apply for the Rubyx Credit Card.
How do I know the payment due date of my ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card?
You can know the payment due date of your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card through the monthly statement, ICICI Bank's iMobile app, Net Banking or by calling our Customer Care on 1800 1080.
What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access?
To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Rubyx Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder.
Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here .
What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow?
Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period.
Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period:
Spends period offer -  eligibility period
Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026.
Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026.
Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here .
Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter
Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow?
Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025.
Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below-
Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section
Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking
Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards
Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’
Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page.
What are the movie ticket benefits available?
Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹150 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Customers with dual Credit Card variants can avail one offer per month per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed Terms & Conditions, please click here
What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders?
Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent.
What security features are provided by the chip and PIN?
The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please click here
What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders?
Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transaction from ₹400 - ₹4000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card.
What are the golf privileges and eligibility criteria?
As a Rubyx Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for a round or lesson of golf for every ₹50,000 spent on retail purchases in the previous calendar month. You can avail of a maximum of 2 rounds per month. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit https://teetimes.truztee.com/ and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered against your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months.
To view the updated list of golf courses, please  click here . For complete details on the Golf programme and the associated terms and conditions, please  click here . You may also call iAssist, the 24/7 concierge service on 1800-26-70731 (toll free for MTNL or BSNL lines) or 022-67872016 (standard call charges applicable) for assistance with online booking.
How do I make the booking for Golf Rounds?
Eligible ICICI Bank Credit Card members can book their Golf Rounds by following the below steps:
Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes.truztee.com/ with your registered mobile number.
Choose your preferred golf course and select your preferred date and tee time.
Submit your booking request and await confirmation.
Check your Booking History to view all bookings and details.
You may also call i-Assist, our 24X7 concierge service on 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL lines) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable), for assistance with online booking. An authorisation amount of ₹2 shall be taken for each eligible Card.
What are the key features of the concierge services offered?
The concierge services provide 24X7 support for varied needs such as restaurant reservations, flower & gift deliveries, hotel & flight bookings, car rentals and even movie ticket delivery. Additionally, the service offers emergency auto assistance and medical concierge support, ensuring comprehensive assistance during emergencies. Contact i-Assist for access to these services. To contact the i-Assist team, please call 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable).
What Air Accident Insurance coverage is provided to Cardholders?
The primary Cardholder is entitled to Air Accident Insurance coverage of ₹1 crore. This benefit applies only when the Card has been used at least once in the 60 days prior to the event. Note that the insurance covers international travel only, provided that the tickets were purchased using the Credit Card. Supplementary Cardholders are not eligible for this insurance coverage. For more details on the terms and conditions of the insurance cover on ICICI Bank Credit Cards, please  click here .
What are the criteria for availing domestic railway lounge access?
Upgrade your travel experience with complimentary access to railway with your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card. Get 2 complementary access to select railway lounges in India every quarter. Simply present your ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card to enjoy the privileges
Over and above the permitted number of complimentary access, each subsequent access will be charged as per rates laid out by each lounge service provider.
The access to railway lounges will be applicable only for primary cardholders.
Click here for a complete list of lounges.
Do I get reward points on Fuel transactions?
No, you do not get reward points on Fuel transactions. 1% fuel surcharge waiver is applicable on all fuel transactions from ₹400 - ₹4000 at any fuel outlet in India.

To contact, please call the toll-free number 18002670731 (Rupay Variant) Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 2 On Retail Spend 1 On Utility and Insurance Spend Redeem reward points for: Health and Beauty Travel and Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion and Lifestyle APPLY NOW Coral Credit Card: Fees and charges Joining Fee and Annual fee Joining fee- ₹500 + Goods and Services Tax (GST) Annual fee- ₹500 + GST (Spend over ₹1.5 lakh and get annual fee waived off for the next year) Forex Markup 3.5% ATM withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month Late payment charges Ranging from ₹100 – ₹1,300 Most important terms & conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges. Click here  for applicable Terms and Conditions (T&Cs) APPLY NOW Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹20,000 Self-employed individual with an annual income of ₹2,40,000 Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones Coral Credit Card Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Is the ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card free? No, the card has a joining fee of ₹500 + GST and an annual fee of ₹500 + GST. What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Coral Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access on Credit Card benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria, click here. To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Coral Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer -  eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . Plus (Add-on) Card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹100 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed Terms & Conditions, please click here What are the criteria for availing domestic railway lounge access? Upgrade your travel experience with complimentary access to select railway lounges with your ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card. Get 1 complimentary access to select railway lounges in India every quarter. Simply present your ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card to enjoy the privileges Over and above the permitted number of complimentary access, each subsequent access will be charged as per rates laid out by each lounge service provider. Click here for a complete list of lounges. Can I make online purchases with the ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card? Yes. You can easily make online purchases across India and in select overseas stores using the ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card. What is CVV in a Credit Card? How do I find it in my ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card? Flip your ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV (Card Verification Value). You can also check it by logging in to your ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking. Which bank’s Credit Card should I opt for? The ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card is an excellent choice. It has a low joining fee and several benefits for movie and travel enthusiasts. What is the age limit to apply for a Coral Credit Card? You must be between the age group of 21–65 years to be eligible to apply for an ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card. How do I know the payment due date of my ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card? You can know thepayment due date of your ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card through the monthly statement, ICICI Bank's iMobile app, Net Banking or by calling our Customer Care on 1800 1080. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here How can I get the annual fee waived off for the ICICI Bank Coral Credit Card? If you spend over ₹1.5 lakh, you can get your annual fee waived off for the next year. What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? A 1% fuel surcharge waiver is eligible for transactions between ₹400 to ₹4000 on HPCL Fuel Stations when the transaction is conducted on ICICI Bank Merchant Services Swipe Machine. This benefit applies to both the primary cardholder and the plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

It has no joining or annual fee. It helps you to earn reward points for almost every purchase and the card also provides a fuel surcharge waiver. Read Less No Joining & Annual Fee Reward Points Fuel Surcharge Waiver Know more Apply Save 25,038 PEOPLE ARE INTERESTED BEST FOR Rewards on Everyday Spends Reward points on transactions No Joining fee No Annual fee Get fuel surcharge waiver Platinum Chip Credit Card: Maximum Benefits Save Money Fuel surcharge waiver Get a 1% waiver on fuel transactions worth ₹400 - ₹4,000 at HPCL pumps. Easy EMI Conversion Shop now and pay later Redeem reward points Redeem reward points across multiple categories Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 2 On Retail Spend 1 On Utility & Insurance Spend Redeem reward points for: Health & Beauty Travel & Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion & Lifestyle APPLY NOW Platinum Chip Credit Card: Fees & Charges Joining Fee & Annual Fee Joining Fee- Nil Annual Fee- Nil Forex Markup 3.5% ATM Withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) APPLY NOW Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age* The salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹20,000* Self-employed with a monthly income of at least ₹20,000* Identity Proof Address Proof Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones Platinum Chip Credit Card FAQs Is there a joining fee or annual fee for Platinum Chip Credit Card? The Platinum Chip Credit Card has no joining fee or annual fee. What is CVV in a Credit Card? How do I find it on my ICICI Bank Platinum Chip Credit Card? Flip your Platinum Chip Credit Card. The three-digit Security Code next to the signature panel is your CVV (Card Verification Value). You can also check it by logging in to your iMobile app or Net Banking. Which bank’s Credit Card should I opt for? The ICICI Bank Platinum Chip Credit Card is an excellent choice. It has no joining fee or annual fee. What is the age limit to apply for a Platinum Chip Credit Card? You must be between the ages of 21-65 years to be eligible to apply for an ICICI Bank Platinum Chip Credit Card. How to know the payment due date of the Platinum Chip Credit Card? You can know the payment due date of your Platinum Chip Credit Card through the monthly statement, iMobile app, Net Banking or by calling our Customer Care on 1800 1080. Which Bank issues a Credit Card at no cost? ICICI Bank issues the Platinum Chip Credit Card without any joining fee and annual fee. For more information, call on 1800 1080. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here . What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of ₹400 to ₹4,000 at HPCL fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. How do the chip and PIN improve security? The chip and PIN provide robust protection against Card misuse by requiring a PIN for in-person transactions. This prevents unauthorized access even if the card is lost or stolen, significantly reducing the risk of fraudulent use. When is the PIN required for transactions? The PIN is required for transactions made on POS terminals (swipe machines) at merchant outlets in physical locations. Customers must enter their PIN on the terminal to complete the transaction securely. Is PIN required for online transactions? No, the PIN is not required for online transactions. Online payments can be completed without entering the PIN, but other security measures may still apply, such as OTP verification. VIEW ALL FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Enjoy seamless integration with the Adani One ecosystem. Earn elevated reward points and exclusive airport privileges like lounge visits, Pranaam services, valet parking and much more. Additionally avail buy one get one offer on BookMyShow for all movie enthusiasts. Read less Airport Benefit Reward Points BookMyShow Offer Know more Apply Save 11,516 PEOPLE ARE INTERESTED BEST FOR Top-notch airport experience Exclusive Airport benefits Valet Parking Buy One Get One offer on BookMyShow Reward benefits Get maximum benefits: Save Money Annually Get 2 Pranaam services, one on card activation and the second on spends of ₹3 lakh Annually Enjoy 16 Premium Lounge upgrades Annually Avail 4 instances of Valet Parking Annually Avail 4 instances of Premium car parking on card activation Annually For every ₹1 lakh spent, get 2 porter services, up to 8 porter services in a year Annually Get 2 complimentary international airport lounge access Quarterly Get 4 Domestic complimentary Airport Lounge access. Click here for lounge list Worth ₹5,000 Earn flight vouchers on spends of ₹25,000 within 60 days of card activation. Worth ₹2,000 Get exclusive Hotel vouchers Twice every month Buy one ticket & get up to ₹500 off on the second ticket through BookMyShow Up to ₹4000 Avail 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions at any fuel outlet Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 7 On Adani One Ecosystem Spend 2 On international spend 1.5 On domestic spend Your reward points will be credited to your Adani OneApp in the form of Adani OneApp Rewards at the end of the billing cycle Adani One Signature Credit Card: Fees and charges Joining Fee & Annual Fee Joining fee- ₹5,000 + Goods and Services Tax (GST) Annual fee- ₹5,000 + GST (Spend over ₹6 lakh and get your annual fee waived off for the next year) Forex Markup 3.5% Automated Teller Machine (ATM) Withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1,300 Most important terms & conditions Please refer to the Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC) for other charges. Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹75,000 Self-employed individual with an annual income of ₹9,00,000 Identity Proof Address Proof Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card FAQs What are the exclusive benefits of an Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? The Adani One Signature Credit Card has exclusive benefits of 2 Pranaam, 8 Porter and 8 car parking (Premium and Valet) services annually, at Adani managed airports. What is an Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? The Adani Card, specifically the Adani One Signature Credit Card, is a premium credit card offered by ICICI Bank that provides various airport, reward and entertainment benefits. How to avail complimentary international airport lounge access? Enjoy 2 complimentary access to international airport lounges with Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary cardholder with Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges What are the criteria for availing domestic airport lounge access? To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Adani One Signature Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the 4 lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Adani One Signature Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer - eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. How can I apply for an Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? To apply for an Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card, visit the Bank’s website or a branch. You can complete the application process online by entering your details and following the prompts. What are the main Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Card benefits? Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Card benefits include discounts, access to airport benefits, reward benefits and exclusive offers on enhancing your overall experience. Can I apply for an Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card online? Yes, you can easily apply for the Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card online through the Bank’s website. Simply follow the steps provided to complete your application. What is the minimum spending requirement for an Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? To enjoy benefits such as waiving the annual fee, you need to meet a minimum spending requirement of ₹6 lakh in a calendar year with your Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card. What types of rewards can I earn with the  Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? With the Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card, you can earn Adani Reward Points on various spends, including domestic, international and utility expenses, allowing you to maximise your rewards. Is there a joining fee for the Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? Yes, the Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card has a joining fee of ₹5,000 plus taxes, which grants you access to all the card's benefits and features. How do I activate my Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card? Once you receive your Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card, you can activate it by following the instructions provided in the Welcome Kit or by logging into the ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking. About Adani One Credit Cards With Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards, you can get lifestyle benefits, reward points and the joy of hassle-free payments. If you are someone who seeks financial flexibility, Adani One Credit Cards have a wide range of advantages to offer you.With Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards, you can get lifestyle benefits, reward points and the joy of hassle-free payments. If you are someone who seeks financial flexibility, Adani One Credit Cards have a wide range of advantages to offer you. What are the different types of Adani Credit Cards? There are two types of Adani Credit Cards - Platinum and Signature. To learn more about the benefits for travel, lifestyle, shopping and more click here What is the joining fee for Adani One Credit Cards? The joining fee for an Adani One Signature Credit Card is ₹5,000 + GST and ₹750 + GST for an Adani One Platinum Credit Card. What are the benefits of Adani One Credit Cards? Adani One ICICI Bank credit cards offer unparalleled benefits, enhancing your experience across the Adani One ecosystem*, including Adani-managed airports, Trainman, gas, electricity, and more. How to apply for a Credit Card online To apply for a Credit Card online, visit the ICICI Bank website (Credit Card page) and select the card. After submitting the application form, complete the Know Your Customer (KYC) verification and get your card. Who is eligible for flight voucher? A customer who has paid their joining or annual fee and completed spends of ₹25,000 (not including joining/annual fee, interest or bank levies) within 60 days of card activation. Customers who have availed card without joining/annual fee shall be ineligible for flight voucher. VIEW ALL FAQ’S Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs
