Enjoy seamless integration with the Adani One ecosystem, earning reward points on spends across Adani-managed airports, Trainman, Adani Gas, Adani Electricity and more. Get exclusive airport lounge access, premium service upgrades and benefits that make every journey more rewarding. Read Less Airport Benefit Reward Points Fuel Benefits Know more APPLY Save 11,584 PEOPLE ARE INTERESTED BEST FOR Premium Travel and Stay Perks Exclusive Airport Benefits Hotel Vouchers Offers on BookMyShow Fuel Benefits Maximum Benefits with the Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Card Save Money Premium lounge upgrades Enjoy 8 premium lounge upgrades annually Annually Avail 2 instances of Valet Parking Annually Avail 2 instances of Premium car parking on card activation Quarterly Get 2 domestic complimentary Airport Lounge access. Click here for lounge list Porter services Get up to 4 Porter services in a year for every ₹1 lakh spend annually Worth ₹2000 Earn flight vouchers on spends of ₹10,000 within 60 days of card activation. 25% off off up to ₹100 Get 2 monthly discounts on movie tickets through BookMyShow Fuel surcharge waiver Avail 1% fuel surcharge waiver up to ₹4,000 on all fuel transactions at any fuel outlet Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 3 On Adani One Ecosystem Spend 1.5 On International Spend 1 On Domestic Spend Your reward points will be credited to your Adani OneApp in the form of Adani OneApp Rewards at the end of the billing cycle Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card: Fees and Charges Joining Fee and Annual Fee Joining Fee- ₹750 + GST Annual Fee- ₹750 + GST (Spend over ₹3 lakh and get your Annual Fee waived off for the following year) Forex Markup 3.5% ATM withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Ranging from ₹100–₹1,300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges. Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen aged over 21 years A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹20,000 Self-employed individual with an annual income of ₹2,40,000 Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend benefits to your loved ones Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card FAQs How can I apply for an Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? To apply, visit ICICI Bank’s website, complete the application process by entering your details and following the prompts or visit any branch. What is the minimum spending requirement for the Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card to enjoy benefits? To enjoy annual fee waiver and other benefits, you need to meet a minimum spending requirement of ₹3 lakh in a calendar year. What are the types of rewards that I can earn with the Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? Earn Adani Reward Points on various spends including domestic, international and utility expenses, allowing you to maximise your rewards. Is there a joining fee for the Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? Yes, joining fee of ₹750 plus GST. How do I activate my Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? Activate your card by following the instructions provided in the welcome kit, by logging into the ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking. About Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards With Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards, you can get lifestyle benefits, reward points and the joy of hassle-free payments. If you are someone who seeks financial flexibility, Adani One Credit Cards have a wide range of advantages to offer you. What are the types of Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards? There are two types: Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card Click here to learn more about the benefits on travel, lifestyle, shopping and more. What is the Joining Fee for Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card - ₹5,000 + GST Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card - ₹750 + GST What is the Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? The Adani Platinum Credit Card is ideal for frequent flyers and comes with welcome vouchers, reward points, entertainment, airport or travel benefits. What are the travel benefits offered with the Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? Enjoy 8 domestic lounge access, 4 porter services and 2 premium car parking services per year at Adani managed airports, for utmost convenience during travel. What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer -  eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter What are the criteria for availing domestic airport lounge access? To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Adani One Platinum Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the 2 lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. How to apply for a Credit Card online? Visit ICICI Bank’s website, go to Credit Cards and select your preferred Card. After submitting the application, complete the KYC verification and get your card. What are the annual charges for Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards? Adani One ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card - ₹750 + GST Adani One ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card - ₹5,000 + GST What are the main benefits of Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Cards? Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Card benefits include discounts on fuel purchases, access to airport lounges and exclusive offers on movie tickets, enhancing your overall experience. Can I apply for an Adani One ICICI Bank Credit Card online? Yes, you can easily apply online through ICICI Bank’s website. Who is eligible for Flight Voucher? A customer who has paid their joining or annual fee and completed spends of ₹10,000 (not including joining/annual fee, interest or bank levies) within 60 days of card activation. Customers who have availed card without joining or annual fee shall be ineligible for flight voucher. VIEW ALL FAQS Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Enjoy the convenience of two networks- MasterCard and RuPay, to meet your every need. Earn unlimited myCash Rewards that never expire, adding value to every transaction. As a bonus, receive a ₹1,000 MakeMyTrip voucher with a validity of 1 year upon paying the joining fee. You’ll also receive a ₹1,000 voucher, valid for 3 months, after paying the annual fee. These vouchers are perfect for frequent travellers. Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 6 On Hotel Booking Spend 3 On Flight, Bus & Cab Spend 1 On All Other Retail Spend Your reward points will be credited to your MakeMyTrip Account in the form of myCash APPLY NOW MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card: Fees and Charges Joining fee & Annual fee Joining fee- ₹999 + GST Annual fee- ₹999 + GST (Spend over ₹3 lakh in one year and get your annual fee waived off for the next year) Forex Markup 0.99 % ATM Withdrawal Fee Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For Late Bill Payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges. Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) APPLY NOW Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹20,000 Self-employed with an annual income of at least ₹2,40,000 Identity Proof Address Proof Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card FAQs Are there any foreign transaction fees on the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? Yes, foreign transaction fees may apply when you use the Card for international purchases. However, the forex markup is only 0.99% + GST. Which transactions do not qualify for earning myCash on the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? Rent payments, cash advances, late payment costs, joining / annual fees, EMI transactions, Balance Transfers and Personal Loan transactions on the Card are not eligible for myCash Rewards. How to avail Complimentary International Airport lounge access? Enjoy 1 complimentary accesses to international airport lounges with MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary cardholder with MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges What are the criteria for availing domestic airport lounge access? To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the 2 lounge access benefit in the following spend quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . How can I redeem myCash earned through the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? You can redeem your myCash on the MakeMyTrip website, mobile site or app during checkout. Select 'myCash & Gift Cards' on the payments page, choose the ‘myCash’ option, enter the amount to redeem, click 'Use & Apply' and then click 'Complete Payment' to complete the transaction. Can I encash or transfer myCash earned through the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card to my bank account? No, myCash earned through the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card cannot be encashed or transferred to a bank account. How to apply for an MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? Click here to visit the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card page Scan the QR code on your mobile phone Download the MakeMyTrip app and apply for the Card. Who can claim the lounge access benefit of the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? The MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card lounge access benefit is available to the primary Cardholder. With this benefit, you can enjoy complimentary entry to select airport lounges, offering a premium travel experience before your flight. What are some of the most attractive benefits of the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? Some of the most attractive benefits of the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card are unlimited myCash Rewards that never expire, exclusive MakeMyTrip vouchers and complimentary lounge access for the primary Cardholder. You’ll also enjoy the flexibility of two payment networks - MasterCard and RuPay, making this Card a versatile and rewarding choice for frequent travellers. Is DigiLocker sufficient for applying for the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card? Yes, DigiLocker can be used to submit your documents when applying for the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card. It provides a secure and digital platform to store and share essential documents, such as proofs of identity, address and income, making the application process faster and more convenient. Simply upload the required documents to DigiLocker and share them during your application. Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend benefits to your loved ones Emirates Skywards ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card FAQs How can I qualify for Emirates Skywards Gold Tier membership using the ICICI Bank Emirates Emeralde Credit Card? To qualify for an upgrade to Skywards Gold Tier, the Emirates Emeralde Credit Cardholder must: Spend a total of ₹15 lakhs within an anniversary year. Out of this, at least ₹50,000 must be spent on Emirates bookings. Even if these criteria are met early, the upgrade happens only after 12 months from the card issuance date and upon payment of the annual fee for the following year. Do supplementary cardholders earn Skywards Miles? Yes. Any eligible spend made by supplementary cardholders of Emirates Emeralde Credit Card will earn Skywards Miles, which will be credited to the primary cardholder’s Emirates Skywards account. The rate of earning remains the same as for primary cardholders. How to avail complimentary international airport lounge access? Enjoy unlimited complimentary access to international airport lounges with ICICI Bank Emirates Emerald Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder. For an ICICI Bank Emirates Emeralde Credit Card customer who has applied for the card on or after 15 November 2024. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary cardholder with ICICI Bank Emirates Emeralde Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For the complete list of international airport lounges, visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges For an ICICI Bank Emirates Emeralde Credit Card customer who has applied for the card before 15 November 2024. DreamFolks Membership Access 650+ lounges in 100+ countries. Present your DreamFolks Membership Card at the participating international lounges. Click here for the complete list of international airport lounges. How can I avail discount on Emirates flight bookings using my ICICI Bank Emirates Emeralde Credit Card? To avail upto 10% discount on Emirates flight bookings, please follow the below steps Visit www.emirates.com or open the Emirates App. Click on “Book Now” Enter promo code “INICI26” before searching for flights. Complete your booking using your Emirates Skywards ICICI Bank Emeralde Credit Card at the time of payment. What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Emirates Emeralde Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer - eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. When will the Skywards Miles be reflected in my Emirates account? The Skywards Miles of your Emirates Emeralde Credit Card are credited to the registered Emirates Skywards account within 48 hours of the credit card statement generation date. The cardholder’s account must remain active and not delinquent during this period. What if I don’t have an Emirates Skywards account before applying for the card? If you are not an Emirates Skywards member at the time of application, ICICI Bank will create one for you. Your personal details, such as your name, email address, and mobile number, will be shared securely with Emirates to enroll you in the program. What types of spending are excluded from milestone calculations? Excluded spends for milestone benefits include: Cash advances Interest or service charges Late payment fee Joining and annual fee Equated Monthly Instalment (EMI) payments Balance transfers Personal Loan on Credit Card (PLCC) transactions Only retail purchases are considered, and reversals are deducted from spending totals. How long are Skywards Miles valid for? Skywards Miles earned are valid for three years from the date of the flight or partner transaction that earned them. After three years, any unused miles will automatically expire. Can Skywards Miles be redeemed by someone else? Skywards Miles can be redeemed only by the primary cardholder of the Emirates Emeralde Credit Card or their authorized travel coordinator. In the case of minors, a parent or guardian may redeem rewards on their behalf, subject to availability and Emirates Skywards terms. View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

What are the joining and annual benefits of the Emirates Sapphiro Credit Card? Cardholders receive 5,000 Skywards Miles and a complimentary Emirates Skywards Silver Tier membership as joining benefits. How to avail complimentary international airport lounge access? Enjoy 2 complimentary accesses to international airport lounges with ICICI Bank Emirates Sapphiro Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder. For an ICICI Bank Emriates Sapphiro Credit Card customer who has applied for the card on or after 15 November 2024. DreamFolks Membership Access 650+ lounges in 100+ countries. Present your DreamFolks Membership Card at the participating international lounges. Click here for the complete list of international airport lounges. What type of lounge access is provided? The primary cardholder receives complimentary access to domestic lounges twice a quarter and international lounges twice a year. What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Emirates Sapphiro Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer - eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Complimentary tickets offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. How can I avail discount on Emirates flight bookings using my ICICI Bank Emirates Sapphiro Credit Card? To avail upto 10% discount on Emirates flight bookings, please follow the below steps Visit www.emirates.com or open the Emirates App. Click on “Book Now” Enter promo code “INICI26” before searching for flights. Complete your booking using your Emirates Skywards ICICI Bank Sapphiro Credit Card at the time of payment. How are Skywards Miles earned? Earn up to 2 Skywards Miles per ₹100 spent on most categories, including dining, travel, and entertainment. How do I redeem the Skywards Miles? Miles in your Emirates Skywards account can be redeemed for flights, upgrades, hotel stays, and more with Emirates and its partners. How can I maintain the Emirates Silver Tier benefit in the subsequent years? To retain the Silver Tier status in subsequent years, an annual spend of ₹5 lakh is required. Who is this card best suited for? You are a frequent Emirates flyer, want to earn Skywards Miles on your spending, and are comfortable with reward redemption being limited to Emirates. You can apply online through the ICICI Bank website or by visiting an ICICI Bank branch. Does Emirates Rubyx Credit Card offer international airport lounge access? No, the Emirates Rubyx Credit Card offers 1 complimentary domestic lounge visit per quarter. and is available only on a spend of ₹75,000 in the preceding quarter. How can I avail discount on Emirates flight bookings using my ICICI Bank Emirates Rubyx Credit Card? To avail upto 10% discount on Emirates flight bookings, please follow the below steps Visit www.emirates.com or open the Emirates App. Click on “Book Now” Enter promo code “INICI26” before searching for flights. Complete your booking using your Emirates Skywards ICICI Bank Rubyx Credit Card at the time of payment. How can I redeem the Skywards Miles earned? You can redeem the miles for flight bookings, upgrades, hotel stays, and more through Emirates and its partners. Does Emirates Rubyx Credit Card offer an annual fee waiver? No, the annual card charges cannot be waived. However, the complimentary Emirates Skywards Blue Tier Membership gets automatically renewed after the annual fee payment. What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Emirates Rubyx Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. What are the entertainment and lifestyle benefits of this card? You can avail of discounts while dining out in select restaurants and movie ticket bookings. How is the maximum credit limit for the Emirates Rubyx credit card determined? The credit limit is determined by the bank and depends on several factors like your credit score, income, and repayment history. Who is this card best suited for? You are a frequent Emirates flyer and want to earn Skywards Miles on your spending, but are looking for an affordable credit card with valuable benefits. Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Is there a joining fee for ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? Yes. The HPCL Super Saver Credit Card has a joining fee of ₹500 + GST. Is there an annual fee for ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? Yes. The HPCL Super Saver Credit Card has an annual fee of ₹500 + GST. What is Card Verification Value (CVV) in a Credit Card? How do I check the same for my ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? Flip your ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV. You can also check it by logging in to your iMobile app or Internet Banking. Which bank’s Credit Card should I choose? If you are looking for the best fuel Credit Card then the ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card is an excellent choice for you. It offers many benefits and savings on fuel, utility and departmental store purchases. What is the age limit to apply for an ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? You must be between the ages of 21-65 years to be eligible to apply for credit card and get ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card. How can I know the payment due date of my ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? You can know the payment due date of your ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card through your monthly statements, iMobile app, Internet Banking or by calling 1800 1080. Which bank gives Credit Cards easily at low cost? You can opt for an ICICI Bank Credit Card as it offers a hassle-free application process. The HPCL Super Saver Credit Card has low joining and annual fees. For more information about the application process, call 1800 1080. What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your HPCL Super Saver Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer -  eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹100 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets, applicable on BookMyShow and INOX, twice a month. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms and conditions, please  click here . What services are included in Roadside Assistance? Roadside Assistance includes 24X7 helpline support, on-site repairs for minor issues like flat tires or dead batteries, towing to authorised workshops for major problems, customer conference call, taxi services for up to 50 km, fuel delivery of up to 5 litres, retrieval of spare keys, custody services for vehicles and vehicle repatriation for repairs taking more than two days. To know more about roadside side assistance service and applicable terms and conditions, please click here  . What is the towing benefit under Roadside Assistance? If your vehicle is immobilised due to electrical or mechanical failure, accident or wrong fuelling, the service provider will arrange for your vehicle to be towed to the nearest authorised OEM workshop. The towing service ensures that your vehicle is safely handled and reaches the appropriate repair facility. How does the Locked / Lost Key benefit work? If you are locked out of your vehicle or your key is lost, the service provider will arrange for the retrieval of your spare key from your residence. This ensures that you can regain access to your vehicle without undue delay or hassle. What is the procedure for using the Roadside Assistance service? Customers must pay the joining/annual fee to activate Roadside Assistance. After the eligibility is confirmed, your contact details are sent to the service provider, who will then send a confirmation SMS with instructions for availing the services. What is the Fuel Delivery benefit? If your vehicle is immobilised due to an empty fuel tank, Roadside Assistance will arrange for the delivery of up to 5 litres of fuel as per actual cost, ensuring you can continue your journey without significant disruption. What happens if vehicle repairs exceed two days? If vehicle repairs take more than two days, you can opt for vehicle repatriation to your hometown for up to 100 km, free of cost. For distances beyond 100 km, repatriation services are available on a chargeable basis, ensuring flexibility for long-term repairs. What is the Replacement / Courtesy Car benefit? If your vehicle is immobilised and you need local mobility, a replacement or courtesy car of a higher category or the best available vehicle will be arranged at prevailing market rates. What emergency accommodation is offered? If your vehicle is immobilised while traveling outstation, Roadside Assistance can help arrange emergency hotel accommodations or medical services near the breakdown location, ensuring your safety and comfort during unexpected incidents. What are the benefits of accelerated reward points on essential daily spends with ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? Now earn reward points on spends for all your daily essentials like utility, groceries and department store purchases. You get 5% cashback on spends across these categories. For every ₹100 spent, you earn 20 ICICI Bank Reward Points, capped at 400 ICICI Bank Reward points per month. How can I earn cashback on fuel purchases with my ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card? Save upto 5% on fuel purchases when the Card is swiped at any HPCL fuel pump on any bank’s POS machine or by using the HP Pay app. You also get an additional 1.5% cashback (Happy Coins) on all fuel purchases through the HP Pay app at HPCL outlets. The fuel savings of 5% comprises of 4% cashback + 1% fuel surcharge waiver (The 4% cashback is capped at ₹200 per month). Why is the ICICI Bank HPCL Credit Card a good choice for fuel savings and daily expenses? The ICICI Bank HPCL Super Saver Credit Card offers 5% savings on fuel spends at HPCL pumps and HP Pay, including a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on transactions between ₹400 and ₹4,000. Cardholders also earn reward points on daily and retail spends, along with movie offers and roadside assistance benefits. VIEW ALL FAQ’S Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Yes. The HPCL Coral Credit Card is an ICICI Bank Credit Card that helps you cut costs with cashback and savings on fuel transactions. Is there a joining fee for the HPCL Coral Credit Card? Yes. Joining fee of ₹199 + GST. Is there an annual fee for the HPCL Coral Credit Card? Yes. Annual fee of ₹199 + GST. What is CVV on a Credit Card? How and where do I find it on my HPCL Coral Credit Card? Flip your HPCL Coral Credit Card to view its reverse side. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV. You can also check it by logging in to your iMobile app or Internet Banking. Which bank has the best Credit Card? ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card is an excellent choice and one of the best fuel credit card , offering great savings and cashbacks on fuel transactions. What is the age limit to apply for an ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card? You must be between the age group of 21 to 65 years to be eligible to apply for credit card and get an ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card. How do I know the due date for my ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card bill payment? You can find the due date in your monthly statement, the iMobile app, through Internet Banking or by contacting our Customer Care on 1800 1080. Which bank provides a Credit Card at low rates? You can opt for an ICICI Bank Credit Card with a seamless application process. The HPCL Coral Credit Card has low joining and annual fees. For more information, please call our Customer Care on 1800 1080. What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer -  eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹100 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets through BookMyShow Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . How can I earn cashback on fuel purchases with my ICICI Bank HPCL Coral Credit Card Save up to 3.5% on fuel purchases at any HPCL fuel pump. The fuel savings of 3.5% comprises of: 2.5% cashback when the card is swiped at any HPCL fuel pump (Capped at ₹100 per month). 1% fuel surcharge waiver when the card is swiped at any HPCL fuel pump using ICICI Bank POS machine. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here . What is the difference between the HPCL Coral Credit Card and ICICI Coral Credit Card? The HPCL Coral Credit Card offers exclusive benefits for fuel purchases at HPCL stations, providing rewards and discounts specifically for fuel transactions. The ICICI Coral Credit Card, on the other hand, offers general rewards on a wide range of categories such as dining, shopping, and travel, but does not provide the same focus on fuel benefits. Get complimentary airport lounge access, reward points on spends, milestone rewards, and a fuel surcharge waiver—all at a low joining and annual fee. Enrich your family moments with movie benefits on BookMyShow. Read Less Custom Card design Airport Lounge Reward Points Know more APPLY SAVE 2,334 PEOPLE ARE INTERESTED BEST FOR Custom Design Credit Card Credit Card with Custom Image Airport Lounge Access BookMyShow and INOX offers Rewards and offers Expressions Credit Card: Maximum Benefits Save Money 175+ pre-installed templates Choose a card image from themes like Zodiac, Sports, Travel and more. Click here 25% off, up to ₹100 Get 2 monthly discounts on movie tickets through INOX & BookMyShow Quarterly Get 1 domestic airport lounge access Fuel Surcharge Waiver Get 1% waiver on fuel transactions worth ₹400 - ₹4,000 at HPCL pumps Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 3 On Retail Spend 1 On Utility and Insurance Spend Redeem reward points for: Health and Beauty Travel and Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion and Lifestyle Expressions Credit Card: Fee and charges Joining Fee ₹499 + GST Annual Fee ₹499 + GST (Spend over ₹1.5 lakh and get your annual fee waived off for the next year) ATM withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum payment is made Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Late payment fee from ₹100 to ₹1,300 (depending on outstanding amount) Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges Click Here for Image Upload Guidelines VIEW TERMS AND CONDITIONS Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones Expressions Credit Card FAQs Does the Expressions Credit Card provide discounts on movie tickets? Yes, the Expressions Credit Card provides a ₹100 discount on the purchase of two movie tickets at BookMShow and INOX. You can avail this offer twice a month. Is an Expressions Credit Card free? No, the card has a joining fee of ₹499 and an annual fee of ₹499. What does CVV stand for in a Credit Card? How do I find it in my Expressions Credit Card? Flip your Expressions Credit Card to the back. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV. You can also check it by logging in to your ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking. Which Bank’s Credit Card is considered to be the best? If you’re looking for one of the best Credit Cards, then ICICI Bank’s Expressions Credit Card is an excellent choice for you. It offers custom Credit Card designs, so your card can reflect your unique personality. What is the age limit for an Expressions Credit Card? You must be in the age group of 21 – 65 years to be eligible for an ICICI Bank Expressions Credit Card How can I find out the due date of an ICICI Bank Credit Card? You can find your ICICI Bank Expressions Credit Card due date on your monthly statement, in the iMobile app, through Internet Banking or by contacting Customer Care on 1800 1080. Which Bank allows Credit Card image customisation easily? You can opt for ICICI Bank, as it offers a seamless application process. The Expressions Credit Card has an option to select the card image. For more information about the application process, call 1800 1080. What are ICICI Bank Credit Card Reward Points? If you’re a Credit Cardholder, you will earn ICICI Bank Reward Points on certain spending. These points can be redeemed through the Reward catalogue on the Bank's website or by logging in to the ICICI Bank's iMobile app. You can use them to purchase vouchers, offers, e-gift cards and more. What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹ 75,000 or more on Expressions Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Expressions Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer -  eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹ 100 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions worth ₹400 – ₹4,000 at HPCL pumps. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplemental) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Read Less No Joining Fee No Annual Fee Low Forex Markup - 1.99% Know more APPLY SAVE 71,010 PEOPLE ARE INTERESTED BEST FOR Rewards on Amazon Purchases Non-expiring, Unlimited rewards Lower forex mark-up at 1.99% on international spends 1 % Unlimited rewards on spends outside Amazon* Seamless rewards, Easy redemption Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card: Maximum Benefits Save Money Markup at 1.99% Lower forex mark-up at 1.99% on international spends Unlimited Rewards Unlimited reward points upto 5% on Amazon purchases* Unlimited Rewards Unlimited reward points of 1% on all other spends* Fuel surcharge waiver 1% Surcharge waiver for all fuel purchase Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spend 5 Prime Member 3 Non- Prime Member 2 100+partner Merchants Enjoy seamless reward points as Amazon Pay balance – with simple and effortless redemption APPLY NOW Fees & Charges Joining Fees NIL Annual Fees NIL ATM Withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month on the withdrawn amount If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For Late Bill Payment Ranging from ₹100–₹1,300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) APPLY NOW Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents Indian citizen with minimum age of 21 Salaried employee with a monthly income of at least ₹ 20,000 Self-employed individual with a monthly income of at least ₹ 30,000 It is an Invite Only Program Proof of identity Proof of address Income Proof Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card FAQs What are the benefits of using this Credit Card? Following are the key benefits of using Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card: No joining and annual fees Unlimited and never-expiring reward points Earn 5% reward points on purchases on Amazon.in for prime members and 3% for non-prime members. Earn 2% reward points at 100+ Amazon Pay partner merchants by using this card on Amazon Pay 1% reward points for all other payments* Low International Forex mark-up fee of 1.99%* Enjoy 3 months no-cost EMI on eligible Amazon.in transactions 1% surcharge waiver on all fuel purchases Earnings in the form of Amazon Pay balance, redeemable for all Amazon and Amazon Pay purchases Automatic conversion of earnings into Amazon Pay balance on the completion of every billing cycle*. How can I apply for an Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card? This is an invite-only programme. Please click here to apply for the Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card. Can I apply for an add-on card? Yes. You can apply for an add-on card. Steps to apply for an add-on card: ICICI Bank's iMobile app: Log in to ICICI Bank's iMobile app > Go to Cards & Forex > Credit Cards > Get Plus Card (Add-on card) > Select the card for which you wish to apply for an add-on card > Enter the details of the applicant > Submit. After this, the add-on card applicant will receive the consent form > Applicant to fill the application details > Complete the V-KYC and submit. Net Banking: Log in to Net Banking > Cards > Credit Cards > Get Plus Card (Add-on card) > Enter the details of the applicant > Proceed. After this, the add-on card applicant will receive the consent form > Applicant to fill the application details > Complete the V-KYC and submit. I have not received my Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card till now. What should I do? You will receive the physical card within 7 working days from the date of approval of your application. An SMS will be sent once the Card is dispatched. Please use your virtual card details to transact online. In case you do not receive the Card within 7 working days, please call our Customer Care on 1800 1080. How do I generate or change the PIN for my credit card? You can generate/change your PIN through any of the following ways: ICICI Bank's iMobile app: Log in to ICICI Bank's iMobile app > Go to Services > Card PIN Services > Generate Credit Card PIN Net Banking: Log in to Net Banking > Generate Card PIN > Credit Card PIN > Select Card and enter CVV > Submit > Enter OTP > Enter PIN > Generate Now Interactive Voice Response (IVR) system: Call on the toll-free number 1800 1080 and follow the instructions. How do I activate my Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card? You can activate your card using: ICICI Bank's iMobile app: Log in to ICICI Bank's iMobile app > Cards & Forex > Choose your Credit Card > Manage Card > Enable International/Online/Tap & Pay transactions. Net Banking: Log in to Net Banking > Cards & Loans > Credit Cards > Manage your Card > Select Card > Enable/Disable Transaction Type/Set Transaction Limit > Generate OTP > Enter the OTP sent to your registered mobile number and complete the process. How do I add my Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card to my Amazon Account? Go to your Amazon Account and click on Manage Payment Methods . Add your Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card to your Amazon.in account as a new payment method. Where do I find the CVV of my Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card? Flip your Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card, the 3-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV (Card Verification Value). You can also check it by logging into the ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking How can I know the bill due date for my Card? You can find the bill due date for your Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card in your monthly statement, on the ICICI Bank's iMobile app, through Net Banking or by contacting Customer Care on 1800 1080. How can I pay outstanding bill for Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card? ICICI Bank Account: Log in to ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking and go to Credit Cards > Select Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card > Pay Now > Select the amount and proceed to payment. Amazon.in app – You can pay your outstanding amount from the Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card dashboard. How can I earn 2% cashback on Amazon Pay partner sites? You need to use the payment method ‘Login and Pay with Amazon’ to carry out purchases on Amazon Pay partner websites. I did not receive the correct Amazon Pay balance based on my earnings for the last billing cycle. What should I do and where should I check whether my earnings have been correctly transferred to my Amazon account? Please call our Customer Care on 1800 1080 from your registered mobile number or e-mail us at customer.care@icicibank.com . You can check your reward points on the ICICI Bank's iMobile app or Net Banking. Also, the aggregate reward points are mentioned in the monthly statement shared by the Bank. Additionally, you can check your Amazon Pay transaction history under 'Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card: Earnings for last billing cycle and the applicable gift card issued for earnings on this Credit Card’ section. These earnings will be credited to your Amazon Account as Amazon Pay balance within 2 working days from the completion of your last billing cycle. How can I use my Amazon Pay earnings? The Amazon Pay balance can be used for partial or full payment of all Amazon and Amazon Pay purchases. If I borrow an Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card from someone else and use it for my own purchases, will I earn in the form of Amazon Pay balance? Please note that these earnings will only be transferred to the card owner’s Amazon Account. If you have borrowed an Amazon Pay ICICI Bank Credit Card from another person and are using it for your transactions, applicable Amazon Pay balance will not be added to your Amazon Account. ₹2,500 + GST Annual Fee - Nil Forex Markup 3.5% ATM Withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For Late Bill Payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1300 Most Important Terms and Conditions Please refer to the Most Important Terms and Conditions (MITC) for other charges Click here for applicable Terms and Conditions (T&Cs) Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹75,000 Self-employed with a monthly income of at least ₹75,000 Identity Proof Address Proof Income Proof Note: *We are no longer accepting applications for MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card FAQs Does the MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card provide any offers on MakeMyTrip? The MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card offers an exclusive MMTBLACK Platinum Membership and a MakeMyTrip Holiday Voucher up to ₹2,500. Is the MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card free? The MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card has a one-time Joining Fee of ₹2,500. How to avail Complimentary International Airport lounge Access? Enjoy 1 complimentary accesses to international airport lounges with MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder. For a MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card customer who has applied for the card on or after November, 15, 2024. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary cardholder with MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges For a MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card customer who has applied for the card before November, 15, 2024. DreamFolks Membership Access 650+ lounges in 100+ countries Present your DreamFolks Membership Card at the participating international lounges Click here for the complete list of international airport loun ges What is CVV on the Credit Card? How do I find it on my MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card? Flip your MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card. The three-digit Security Code next to the signature panel is your CVV. You can also check it by logging in to your iMobile. How to know the Due Date of ICICI Bank Credit Cards? You can find your ICICI Bank MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card’s due date in your monthly statement, on the iMobile, through Internet Banking or by contacting Customer Care on 1800 1080. What is myCash? If you hold the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card , you will earn MakeMyTrip myCash on certain transactions. These rewards can be redeemed through the MakeMyTrip platform against bookings made on the MakeMyTrip platform What are the criteria for availing Domestic Airport Lounge Access? To enjoy Domestic Airport Lounge Access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What are the criteria for availing International airport lounge Access? Enjoy 1 complimentary access to international airport lounges with Dreamfolks membership card provided with your MakeMyTrip Signature Credit Card. As a Dreamfolks member, you can relax at more than 650+ comfortable and luxurious airport lounges across 100+ countries around the world, regardless of the airline or class you fly with, or whether or you are a member of an airline frequent flyer club or not. This feature is available for Primary card members only. Please present your Dreamfolks membership card to the lounge staff at the entrance of the participating International Lounges, to avail the complimentary benefits. Click here  for a complete list of lounges. What are the criteria for availing railway lounge access? Enjoy 1 complimentary railway lounge access in a quarter to participating lounges in India Please note that the railway lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. To view the complete list of lounges,  Click here What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹150 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms and conditions, please  click here . What is the Fuel Surcharge Waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% Fuel Surcharge Waiver on all fuel transactions of ₹400 to ₹4,000 at HPCL fuel outlet when the Card is swiped on ICICI Merchant Services swipe machines in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here What are the criteria for availing domestic railway lounge access? Upgrade your travel experience with complimentary access to railway with your MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card. Get 1 complimentary access to select railway lounges in India every quarter. Simply present MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card to enjoy the privileges Over and above the permitted number of complimentary access, each subsequent access will be charged as per rates laid out by each lounge service provider. The access to railway lounges will be applicable only for primary cardholders. Click here for a complete list of lounges. VIEW ALL FAQ’S Blogs and Videos Blogs Explore more videos

Enjoy your journey with exciting perks, exclusive discounts and more Read Less One-time Joining Fee Holiday voucher myCash points Know more SAVE 5,010 PEOPLE ARE INTERESTED BEST FOR Attractive MakeMyTrip Benefits Accelerated rewards on MakeMyTrip Lounge access Get Milestone benefits Get myCash on transactions MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card: Maximum Benefits Save Money Welcome Voucher Get a MakeMyTrip holiday voucher and ₹500 myCash Milestone Rewards Get 1,000 myCash on spends of ₹2.5 lakh and 1,000 myCash on spends of ₹50,000 on the MakeMyTrip platform Quarterly Get 1 domestic airport lounge access,  Click here  for lounge list Annually Get 4 complimentary railway lounge access,  Click here for lounge list Fuel Surcharge Waiver Get 1% waiver on fuel transactions worth ₹400–₹4,000 at HPCL pumps on ICICI Bank Point of Sale (POS) Machines Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹200 spend 3 On Hotel Booking Spend 2 On Flight Booking Spend 1 On Domestic Spend Your reward points will be credited to your MakeMyTrip Account in the form of myCash MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card: Fees and Charges Joining Fee and Annual Fee Joining Fee- ₹500 + GST Annual Fee- Nil Forex Markup 3.5% ATM Withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1,300 Most Important Terms and Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms and Conditions (MITC)  for other charges Click here for applicable Terms and Conditions (T&Cs) Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age A salaried individual with a monthly income of ₹20,000 Self-employed with an annual income of at least ₹20,000 proof of identity proof of address Income Proof Note: *We are no longer accepting applications for MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Signature Credit Card. MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card FAQs Does the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card provide any offers on MakeMyTrip? Yes. It does. The Credit Card offers a MakeMyTrip holiday voucher of up to ₹3,000. Is the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card free? No. The Credit Card has a one-time joining fee of ₹500+ GST. What is CVV in a Credit Card? How do I find it for my MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? Flip your Credit Card. The three-digit security code next to the signature panel is your CVV. You can also check it by logging in to your ICICI Bank's iMobile app. How can I know the due date of my MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card? You can check the due date of your Credit Card through your monthly statements, ICICI Bank's iMobile app, iMobile, Net Banking or by calling 1800 1080. What is myCash? If you hold the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card, you will earn MakeMyTrip myCash on certain transactions. These rewards can be redeemed through the MakeMyTrip platform against bookings made on the MakeMyTrip platform What are the criteria for availing domestic airport lounge access? To enjoy domestic airport lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your MakeMyTrip Platinum Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. Please note that the airport lounge access credit card benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What are the criteria for availing railway lounge access? Enjoy 1 complimentary railway lounge access in a quarter to participating lounges in India Please note that the railway lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. To view the complete list of lounges,  Click here What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹100 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of ₹400 to ₹4,000 at HPCL fuel outlet when the Card is swiped on ICICI Merchant Services swipe machines in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplemental) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here What are the criteria for availing domestic railway lounge access? Upgrade your travel experience with complimentary access to railway with your MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card. Get 1 complimentary access to select railway lounges in India every quarter. Simply present MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card to enjoy the privileges Over and above the permitted number of complimentary access, each subsequent access will be charged as per rates laid out by each lounge service provider. The access to railway lounges will be applicable only for primary cardholders. Click here for a complete list of lounges. Where can I find the list of lounges available for MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card Holders? You can check participating lounge websites to clarify if the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Platinum Credit Card is accepted. Where can I find the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card lounge access list? You can find the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card lounge access list on the official MakeMyTrip website page dedicated to the card. The complete list of eligible lounges is also available in the downloadable document in the tabs ‘Domestic lounges’ and ‘International lounges’ provided on the page. What are the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card charges? The charges for the MakeMyTrip ICICI Bank Credit Card are detailed in the Fees and Charges section. Applicable charges may vary based on card usage and the specific terms and conditions. View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card: FAQs What is the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card? The Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card is designed for cricket enthusiasts. You will get benefits like complimentary match tickets, Meet and Greet sessions with players and a chance to attend a training session. What are the benefits of the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card? It offers benefits such as fuel surcharge waiver, complimentary match tickets, ICICI Bank Reward Points and Meet and Greet sessions with top players. How to apply for the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card online? You can visit the ICICI Bank website and choose the Card you want to apply for, follow the steps and complete your application. The Card will be issued in a few working days. What is the joining fee for the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card? The joining fee for the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card is ₹500 + GST. What are the joining benefits of the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card? You will receive 2,000 ICICI Bank Reward Points as a joining and renewal gift. What are the annual benefits of the Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card? You will receive an annual fee waiver on spending more than ₹1,50,000 in the previous year. What exclusive benefits can I get with this Card? A chance to meet your favourite cricket players, attend a training session of the CSK team and receive autographed merchandise from a marquee player. How can I earn Reward Points on this card? You can easily earn 10 Reward Points on every ₹100 spent (except fuel) on CSK match days. You can redeem these points for gifts and rewards. What exclusive benefits can a top spender enjoy with the Chennai Super Kings Credit Card? The top spender gets the following exclusive benefits: An exclusive meet-and-greet session with select players An opportunity to attend a practice session with the Chennai Super Kings team Complimentary tickets to a Chennai Super Kings home match, during the playing season. To know more about the Top Spender campaign,  click here  . What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria, click here. To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What is the criteria for being eligible for the movie benefits offer with BookMyShow? Starting Apr 1, 2026, to be eligible for availing complimentary tickets offer on movie/ events tickets with BookMyShow, you must spend ₹25,000 or more on your Chennai Super Kings ICICI Bank Credit Card within the preceding spends quarter. This entitles you to avail the offer in the following calendar quarter. Please go through the illustration below to understand spends and offer eligibility period. Please go through the below illustration to understand the spends period along with the lounge eligibility period: Spends period offer -  eligibility period Spend ₹25,000 between Dec 26, 2025 and Mar 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between Apr 01, 2026 and June 30, 2026. Spend ₹25,000 between Mar 26, 2026 and June 25, 2026 - Get movie offer benefit between July 01, 2026 and Sep 30, 2026. Customers with Credit Card on dual networks (Mastercard & Amex | Visa & RuPay) can avail one movie offer per month, per variant. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please click here . Add-on/Plus card members need to individually spend ₹25,000 in the preceding spends quarter, to be eligible for the offer in the subsequent calendar quarter Is there any cashback offer on American Express Credit Card variant while booking movie tickets on BookMyShow? Cashback offers on the Amex variant have been revoked effective from 01 Jan 2025. Customers can avail upfront offers while booking tickets on BookMyShow by following the steps below- Navigate to ‘Apply Offers’ section Click on the tab - Credit/ Debit/ Net Banking Choose ICICI Bank Credit Card 25% Discount Offer on selected ICICI Bank Credit Cards Enter the Card Number and click ‘Apply Offer’ Once the success message shows up, the offer will be applied on the billing page. What are the movie ticket benefits available? Cardholders are eligible for a 25% off on movie ticket offer worth up to ₹100 on the purchase of a minimum of two tickets. Any additional bookings beyond the complimentary benefit will be charged as per the rates decided by the service provider. To book your movie ticket and for detailed terms & conditions, please  click here . What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please click here What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of up to ₹4,000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplemental) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. VIEW ALL FAQS Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs

The ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card is designed for Indian Defence and Paramilitary personnel. What are the benefits of the Parakram Select Credit Card? The ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card gives benefits like reward points on CSD purchases, complimentary golf access & airport lounge access, insurance benefits and fuel surcharge waiver, specially for Defence personnel. How to avail Complimentary International Airport lounge access? Enjoy 2 complimentary accesses to international airport lounges with ICICI Bank Emeralde Metal Credit Card. Complimentary benefits are applicable only for the primary cardholder. Priority Pass Membership Complimentary Priority Pass Membership for the primary cardholder with ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card Access 1,400+ lounges in 145+ countries worldwide Present your Priority Pass Membership Card at the participating international lounges. For complete list of international airport lounges visit https://www.prioritypass.com/airport-lounges What rewards can be earned on everyday purchases with the Parakram Select Credit Card? Earn 2 ICICI Bank Reward Points for every ₹100 spent using the Card on certain categories of spends. Also earn 10 ICICI Bank Reward Points per ₹100 spent at grocery stores, department stores and CSDs, with maximum 1,000 reward points earned per month. Can I make an online purchase with the ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card? Yes. You can easily make online purchases across India and in select overseas stores using the ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card. What are the lounge benefits that the Parakram Select Credit Card offers? The ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card gives 2 complimentary lounge accesses at international airports every year and 2 lounge accesses at domestic airports every quarter. What are the golf round benefits? The ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card offers a complimentary golf round every month on spends of ₹50,000 the previous month. What are the insurance benefits of the Parakram Select Credit Card? The ICICI Bank Parakram Select Credit Card gives personal accident insurance cover of ₹2 lakh and Air Accident cover of ₹20 lakh to the Cardholder. What are the criteria for availing domestic lounge access? To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹75,000 or more on your Parakram Select Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria,  click here . To view the complete list of lounges,  click here . What fraud protection benefits are available to Cardholders? Cardholders are protected against fraudulent transactions with Counterfeit Card Liability, ensuring coverage against unauthorised usage. Additionally, the Card provides an Account Takeover Cover, which safeguards you in case your personal information is accessed or misused by a third party without your consent. What security features are provided by the chip and PIN? The Credit Card comes with an embedded microchip that provides enhanced security against counterfeiting and duplication. For transactions at merchant outlets, customers must enter a Personal Identification Number (PIN) to complete the payment. However, this PIN is not required for online transactions. To know more about Chip and PIN security, please  click here What is the fuel surcharge waiver offered to Cardholders? Cardholders can avail of a 1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of up to ₹4,000 at any fuel outlet in India. This benefit applies to both the primary Cardholder and the Plus (supplementary) cardholder, helping them save on regular fuel expenses. The waiver is automatically applied when the eligible transaction is completed using the Credit Card. What are the golf privileges and eligibility criteria? As a Parakram Select Credit Cardholder, you are eligible for a round or lesson of golf for every ₹50,000 spent on retail purchases in the previous calendar month. You can avail of a maximum of 1 rounds per month. The benefit can be booked through the Golftripz website. Simply visit  https://teetimes.truztee.com/ and create a Golftripz account using the same e-mail ID as registered against your ICICI Bank Credit Card. Benefits will be credited to your account by the 10th day of the following month, available for use in the next two months. To view the updated list of golf courses, please  click here . For complete details on the Golf programme and the associated terms and conditions, please  click here . You may also call iAssist, the 24x7 concierge service on 1800-26-70731 (toll free for MTNL/ BSNL lines) or 022-67872016 (standard call charges applicable) for assistance with online booking. How do I make the booking for Golf Rounds? Eligible ICICI Bank Credit Card members can book their Golf Rounds by following the below steps: Log in to the ICICI Bank Golf platform https://teetimes.truztee.com/ with your registered mobile number. Choose your preferred golf course and select your preferred date and tee time. Submit your booking request and await confirmation. Check your Booking History to view all bookings and details. You may also call i-Assist, our 24X7 concierge service on 1800 26 70731 (toll free for MTNL/BSNL lines) or 022 6787 2016 (standard call charges applicable), for assistance with online booking. An authorisation amount of ₹2 shall be taken for each eligible Card. View all FAQs Blogs and Videos Explore more blogs
