Click here  to update your Nominee details Click here  for T&Cs Fuel surcharge waiver Get 1% waiver on fuel purchases at all fuel stations Earn and Use Reward Points Earn Points on every ₹100 spen d 1 On Domestic Spend Redeem reward points for: Health & Beauty Travel & Luggage Shopping Voucher Home Appliances Electronics Fashion & Lifestyle Parakram Credit Card: Fees & Charges Joining fee & Annual fee Joining fee- Nil Annual fee- Nil Forex Markup 3.5% ATM withdrawal Pay 3.75% interest per month If only minimum due is paid Pay 3.75% interest per month For late bill payment Ranging from ₹100 to ₹1300 Most Important Terms & Conditions Please refer to the  Most Important Terms & Conditions (MITC)  for other charges Click here for applicable Terms & Conditions (T&Cs) Things you’ll need to apply Eligibility Documents An Indian citizen over 21 years of age Indian Defence and Paramilitary personnel Identity Proof Address Proof Income Proof No physical documents required ICICI Bank Plus Card Extend Benefits To Your Loved Ones Parakram Credit Card FAQs Who should use the Parakram Credit Card from ICICI Bank? The Parakram Credit Card from ICICI Bank is best suited for Defence personnel. What are the benefits of the ICICI Bank Parakram Credit Card? The ICICI Bank Parakram Credit Card comes with benefits such as reward points on CSD purchases, airport lounge access, insurance benefits and fuel surcharge waiver. How many reward points can be earned on everyday purchases with the Parakram Credit Card? Earn 1 reward point for every ₹100 spent and 5 accelerated reward points for every ₹100 spent at grocery stores, department stores and Canteen Stores Departments (CSD), with a maximum of 1,000 reward points earned per month. Can I make an online purchase with the ICICI Bank Parakram Credit Card? Yes. You can easily make online purchases in India as well as at select overseas online stores using the ICICI Bank Parakram Credit Card. What are the lounge benefits that the Parakram Credit Card offers? The Parakram Credit Card comes with 1 airport lounge access per quarter. To enjoy domestic lounge access, you must spend ₹ 75,000 or more on your Parakram Credit Card in a calendar quarter. This entitles you to avail the lounge access benefit in the following calendar quarter. The benefit is exclusively applicable to the primary Cardholder. Please note that the airport lounge access benefit is available only for primary Cardholders. For more details on the criteria, click here. To view the complete list of lounges,  click here. Which Credit Card is ideal for Defence personnel? The ICICI Bank Parakram Credit Card is an excellent choice for Defence personnel. It offers reward points on almost every purchase. What are the insurance benefits of the Parakram Credit Card? The ICICI Bank Parakram Credit Card has personal insurance cover of ₹2 lakh and air accident insurance cover of ₹20 lakh. ICICI Bank Purchase Card FAQs
What is the ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card?
The ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card is designed to simplify business purchases and streamline vendor payments. It offers interest-free credit for up to 45 days and detailed spend tracking to help manage corporate expenses efficiently
How can I pay my ICICI Bank Purchase Card bill?
You can pay your ICICI Bank Purchase Card bill via multiple channels, including online banking, cheque or draft, NEFT, Click to Pay, or cash deposit at ICICI Bank branches.
What happens if I don’t pay the full amount on my ICICI Bank Purchase Card?
If the full amount is not paid by the due date, late payment charges will be applicable as mentioned in MITC
How can I manage and track my ICICI Bank Purchase Card spending?
You can manage your ICICI Bank Purchase Card through ICICI Bank’s Net Banking. It allows you to view statements, track payments, and monitor both current and previous billing cycles.
Can I receive alerts for my ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card transactions?
Yes, you can register your contact details with the bank to receive mobile and email alerts about payment due dates, payment confirmation, and e-statements for your ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card.
Is there 24/7 customer support for ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card holders?
Yes, ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card holders have access to 24/7 customer care to resolve queries and service requests promptly.
What are some key features printed on the ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card?
The ICICI Bank Purchase Credit Card features your embossed name, company name, card number (membership number), validity date, hologram or logo for global acceptance, signature panel and a magnetic strip for added security.

Central Travel Account Card: Features
Centralized Billing
Single Consolidated statement for all travel related expenses of the Corporate, that too with a credit period of upto 50 days
Automatic Reconciliation
Bank provides transaction details to the network, and the Travel Management Company provides Travel Booking details, the same is matched by the network and shared with the Corporate which it can integrate with its ERP systems for better tracking, transparency, and analysis.
Control over Spends
CTA Cards come with MCC level restrictions to ensure that the card is used only for the purpose of travel bookings
Insurance

How to Apply for a Central Travel Account Card

Central Travel Account Card FAQs
What is a Central Travel Account (CTA) Card?
The ICICI Bank CTA Card is a centralised corporate payment solution that allows businesses to manage all travel-related expenses through one account. Instead of issuing separate cards to each employee, the company can route bookings and payments centrally, ensuring better control, transparency, and simplified reconciliation.
Who can apply for a CTA Card?
The CTA Card is issued only to corporates and business entities that have regular travel and lodging requirements, subject to eligibility and documentation.
What are the key benefits of the CTA Card?
The card provides corporates with the convenience of making all payments through a single account, resulting in enhanced control over expenses. It helps in easier reconciliation through consolidated statements, supports integration with ERP systems and Travel Management Companies (TMCs). It is globally accepted at airlines, hotels and travel agencies, which makes it an ideal solution for managing both domestic and international travel expenses.
How is the CTA Card different from a Corporate Credit Card?
A Corporate Credit Card is issued to individual employees to meet their business travel and expense requirements, while a CTA Card is issued at the company level and is primarily used for centralised travel bookings. The CTA Card ensures that all travel spends are consolidated into one account, whereas Corporate Credit Cards are designed for distributed employee-level usage.
What kind of expenses can be paid using the CTA Card?
The CTA Card is designed exclusively for travel-related expenses. It can be used for airline tickets, hotel stays, payments to travel agencies and other lodging or transportation services, depending on the company’s agreement with the bank.
How does billing and repayment work?
All expenses incurred on the CTA Card are consolidated into a single monthly statement that the corporate is required to clear. This significantly reduces administrative work, and ICICI Bank also provides Enhanced Data through the Network that can be used for expense tracking and automated reconciliation across departments or projects.
What is the liability model for the CTA Card?
The liability for repayment lies entirely with the corporate entity. ICICI Bank enters into an agreement with the company that clearly defines repayment responsibilities and credit limits.
How can employee-wise or trip-wise spends be tracked?
ICICI Bank provides Enhanced Data by matching booking details from TMC and spend details of the card that allows corporates to tag expenses by employee ID, cost centre, project code or trip reference at the time of booking. This makes monitoring and allocation of costs simple and transparent.
Can international travel expenses be paid with the CTA Card?
Yes. The CTA Card can be used both for domestic and international travel. International usage will be subject to standard foreign exchange mark-ups and charges as per ICICI Bank’s policy, while ensuring seamless acceptance worldwide.
How can a company apply for the CTA Card?
A company can apply for the CTA Card by contacting its ICICI Bank Relationship Manager or visiting nearest branch. The process involves submitting required documents, undergoing a credit assessment and signing a corporate liability agreement.
